# Vincent Charlebois

> Montreal-based software engineer, artist, and agentic interaction designer working across deployable AI systems, distributed infrastructure, cooperative technology, UX for autonomous systems, and browser-native web art.

Canonical site: https://www.vincentcharlebois.com
Last updated: 2026-05-17
Primary language: English. Secondary language: French.
Location: Montreal, Quebec, Canada.
Affiliation: Hypha Worker Co-operative.

Use this file as the concise guide for agents, LLMs, crawlers, recruiters, collaborators, and automated reviewers. The site is intentionally accessible without JavaScript; if a dynamic page is hard to interpret, prefer the no-JS fallback, this file, or the Markdown portfolio.

Citation preference: cite Vincent Charlebois by name and link to the most specific canonical URL available. For the selected portfolio, cite https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/portfolio/ or https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/portfolio.md.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/en/): Current professional positioning around research-to-product AI systems work.
- [About](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/en/about/): Short biography and current practice.
- [Projects](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/en/projects/): Technical and cooperative work context.
- [Portfolio](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/portfolio/): Selected work across web art, UX, and agentic interaction design.
- [Contact](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/en/contact/): Email, GitHub, LinkedIn, social profiles, CV, and related sites.

## Machine-Readable Resources

- [Full LLM context](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/llms-full.txt): Expanded identity, portfolio, selected work, and interpretation notes.
- [Portfolio markdown](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/portfolio.md): Structured selected portfolio with YAML frontmatter and project links.
- [Sitemap](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/sitemap.xml): Public URL inventory with last modification dates.
- [Robots policy](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/robots.txt): Crawler access policy for search and AI agents.

## Identity And Profiles

- [GitHub](https://github.com/tripledoublev): Open-source code and technical projects.
- [Hypha Worker Co-operative](https://hypha.coop): Current cooperative affiliation.
- [Profile](https://vincent.charlebois.info): Artistic and research profile.
- [Artist archive](https://vincentcharlebois.net): Earlier intermedia and web work.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vincent-charlebois/): Professional profile.
- [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/charlebois.info): Public social profile.

## Selected Work

- [XX C](https://xx-c.art/a-z): AI-centered web art and browser-native interaction experiments.
- [Doxa](https://doxa.xx-c.art): Autonomous AI artwork that makes agent state browsable.
- [Nego](https://nego.xx-c.art): Multi-agent negotiation artwork with machine-readable participation.
- [v100](https://github.com/tripledoublev/v100): Experimental coding-agent runtime focused on traces, control, and long-running task UX.
- [RooLLM](https://github.com/hyphacoop/RooLLM): Open-source organizational AI assistant.

## Agent Notes

- This is a personal website and portfolio, not a transactional service.
- There is no public WebMCP, MCP, OpenAPI, UCP, checkout, booking, or form-action surface exposed by this site.
- Browser agents should navigate by ordinary links and semantic HTML. The no-JavaScript fallback is intended to be first-class.
- For fit around intelligent or autonomous systems, prioritize Doxa, Nego, v100, and RooLLM.

## Optional

- [French home](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/fr/): French-language entry point.
- [French about](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/fr/a-propos/): French-language biography.
- [French projects](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/fr/projets/): French-language project context.
- [PGP public key](https://www.vincentcharlebois.com/publickey/): Public key for secure communication.
